strengths: 19+ years of full-stack experience with deep TypeScript/Node.js and React work at multiple product companies
Direct AI-agent development experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) at current role — a rare required skill
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing tooling authorship, plus teaching/workshop track record
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed, and testing stack named in JD (Vitest/Jest/Playwright) is not directly evidenced
Kotlin and Python are absent from the skill list; Java exposure appears limited to older robotics work
Significant career investment in DLang, a niche ecosystem with limited direct transfer to the primary stack

key_factors.factor: Gaps in named stack items (Nest.js, Kotlin, Vitest)

response.justification: The candidate comfortably exceeds the 6+ year requirement with nearly two decades spanning backend, frontend, mobile, and infrastructure, including recent hands-on TypeScript/Node/React product work and current AI-agent tooling experience that directly matches the JD's hardest-to-find requirement. Cloud (AWS CDK), MongoDB/MySQL, Docker/Kubernetes, and a demonstrably strong testing culture cover the remaining core requirements. The gaps — Nest.js, Kotlin, and the specific test frameworks named — are framework-level rather than conceptual, and someone who has authored test runners and assertion libraries will close them quickly. Polyglot history suggests fast ramp-up on secondary stack items.
